<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Http\Client\Common; use Http\Client\HttpAsyncClient; use Http\Client\HttpClient; /** * Emulates a synchronous HTTP client with the help of an asynchronous client. * * @author Márk Sági-Kazár <mark.sagikazar@gmail.com> */ final class EmulatedHttpClient implements HttpClient, HttpAsyncClient { use HttpAsyncClientDecorator; use HttpClientEmulator; public function __construct(HttpAsyncClient $httpAsyncClient) { $this->httpAsyncClient = $httpAsyncClient; } }
